romance.positive_modifier: warm colors, intimate imagery, soft focus, script-friendly elegance, tender emotion
romance.negative_modifier: violence, dark horror themes, urban decay

thriller.positive_modifier: dark tones, high contrast, suspenseful atmosphere, isolated locations, ominous texture
thriller.negative_modifier: bright playful scenes, cheerful cartoon look, whimsical tone

fantasy.positive_modifier: magical elements, ornate borders, epic landscapes, mythical creatures, rich symbolic detail
fantasy.negative_modifier: mundane office settings, modern consumer tech, minimalist realism

science_fiction.positive_modifier: space scale, futuristic cityscapes, advanced technology motifs, cosmic phenomena
science_fiction.negative_modifier: pastoral countryside, medieval realism, rustic domestic scenes

non_fiction.positive_modifier: professional authoritative composition, clean imagery, factual visual language
non_fiction.negative_modifier: fantastical surrealism, dreamy abstraction without context

children.positive_modifier: bright colors, playful fonts, illustrated style, friendly characters
children.negative_modifier: dark violence, body horror, bleak realism

historical.positive_modifier: muted tones, period-appropriate imagery, aged textures, serif typography
historical.negative_modifier: neon futurism, cyberpunk technology, contemporary urban branding

literary_fiction.positive_modifier: abstract symbolic mood, minimalist composition, emotionally evocative imagery
literary_fiction.negative_modifier: literal stock-photo framing, overt commercial ad aesthetics

philosophy.positive_modifier: contemplative abstract symbolism, classical references, meditative visual tempo
philosophy.negative_modifier: action spectacle, slapstick humor, literal gore

mystery.positive_modifier: enigmatic motifs, shadowed depth, investigative atmosphere, subtle tension
mystery.negative_modifier: bright comic style, overt romance framing, cheerful daytime mood
